headline: Super Micro, ServiceNow, GE Vernova, and More Stocks That Explain Today’s Market
summary: FEATURE  Stocks were muted Wednesday as investors await key earnings from Tesla Alphabet and International Business Machines after the closing bell.  Super Micro Computer Inc. was the top performer, jumping 24% after the AI server maker doubled its previous guidance for gross margins for the fiscal fourth quarter.

headline: Is GLW Stock a Smart Investment Option Before Q2 Earnings Release?
summary: Corning's AI-driven optical business and solar growth support its outlook as Corning heads into Q2 earnings. Is the momentum enough to continue?

headline: Could Corning (GLW) Be 17% Overvalued Following Mixed Views Ahead Of Earnings?
summary: Corning (GLW) is drawing attention ahead of its July 28 earnings release as investors weigh expectations for year-over-year earnings and revenue growth against mixed analyst commentary and recent valuation concerns. See our latest analysis for Corning. At a share price of $162.41, Corning has had a 1-day share price return of 6.08% but is down 13.45% over 7 days and 16.68% over 30 days. Its 1-year total shareholder return of 203.93% and 3-year total shareholder return of about 4x signal...
